CustomField.description: fields missing at the current stage. Product sales has more fields than service sales.
CustomField.formula:
IF( fxRecordTypeDevName__c ="PKI_Americas_SPI", IF ( Quick_Close__c =True, "" ,IF( OR( CONTAINS(TEXT(Type), "Instrument") ,CONTAINS(TEXT(Type), "Demo") ,CONTAINS(TEXT(Type), "Software") ) ,IF( OR( INCLUDES(Owner.fxUserExtraAttributes__c ,"2010-QS3 Not Required") ,TEXT(Owned_by_Company__c) = 'LSDX' ,Quick_Close__c=True ,TEXT(Owner.Owned_by_Company__c) = 'LSDX' ) ,"" ,IF(Current_Quote_Number__c = "123XYZe",'•QS3 Quote #;' ,"" ) & IF( Current_Quote_Number__c <> "CPQ123","" ,IF( NOT(ISNULL(Quote_Date__c)),'•QS3 Quote Date;' ,"" ) ) & IF( Current_Quote_Number__c<>"CPQ" ,"" ,IF( NOT(ISNULL(Quote_Expiration_Date__c)),'•Quote Expiration Date;' ,"" ) ) ) ,"" ) & IF( INCLUDES(Owner.fxUserExtraAttributes__c ,"2020-SOS Not Required") ,"" , IF(TEXT(PAIN__c)="",'•PAIN;',"") & IF(TEXT(POWER__c)="",'•POWER;',"") & IF(TEXT(VISION__c)="",'•VISION;',"") & IF(TEXT(VALUE__c)="",'•VALUE;',"") & IF(TEXT(COLLABORATE__c)="",'•COLLABORATE;',"")& IF(TEXT(COMPELLING_REASON_TO_ACT_CRTA__c)="",'•CRTA;',"") ) & IF(AND( TEXT(Owned_by_Company__c) = 'LSDX' , DATEVALUE(CreatedDate) > DATEVALUE("2024-05-08") ) ,IF(AND( Current_Quote_Number__c =NULL ,NOT(OR( TEXT(Type)="Monthly RunRate" , TEXT(Type)="NA Aftermarket-SalesLoft" , TEXT(Type)="Reagent - Standing Order" ) ) ) ,'•CPQ Quote;'
,IF( AND( Current_Quote_Number__c !=NULL ,Amount =0 ) ,'•Products;' ,"" ) ) ,"" ) ) ,"" )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: fields missing at the current stage
CustomField.label: fxMissingFields_stage3
